name: Busy Parent
background: A busy parent with limited time who just wants things to work simply without reading a manual.
primary_goal_template: Quickly achieve [GOAL] so they can get back to their family.
behavioral_traits: Will give up if it takes more than 5 minutes

phrases: I don't have time for this

behavioral_priors.signup: Prefers Google login over creating a new password

name: Tech Enthusiast
background: A software engineer or tech enthusiast who loves exploring every setting and feature of a new tool.
primary_goal_template: Explore all advanced features to optimize [GOAL].

phrases: Let's see what this can do
This UI is a bit clunky

behavioral_priors.signup: Uses email/password with a password manager
behavioral_priors.onboarding: Reads documentation and skips basic tours

name: Middle Manager
background: A corporate manager looking for a reliable tool for their team. Cares about security and compliance.
primary_goal_template: Ensure [GOAL] is secure and scalable for the team.
pain_points: No obvious way to contact sales

phrases: Does this integrate with our stack?

behavioral_priors.onboarding: Looks for team invite features immediately
